The genus Cadetia is part of the subtribe Cranichidinae, which is a group of terrestrial orchids. Cadetia ceratostyloides is native to tropical regions and is characterized by its unique flowers and growth habit. The plant's classification provides insight into its evolutionary relationships with other orchid species.
